positive: A highly stylized minimalist composition featuring a whimsical, floating constellation made of glowing, interconnected geometric shapes and celestial objects, such as crescent moons and stylized stars. The central arrangement should be clean, balanced, and easily readable. The color palette should be deep indigo and sapphire blue mixed with luminous cyan and soft gold accents. Use a bioluminescent, vaporwave aesthetic with strong contrast and sharp lines, evoking a sense of dreamlike mystery. The overall composition must be suitable for a repeating, highly visible print on fabric, focusing on clean silhouettes against a dark background.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, copyright, messy, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, solid colors only
